review_title: Data extraction capabilities and business invoicing at its best
description: Overall we mainly use this software for scanning business cards data, so that we can put that data into our autonation sofware for sending them marketing messages and schedule a Demo meeting with them. for extraction of data from number of business cards, it hardly takes 5-10 minutes and also we used this for business invoicing from different vendors , to keep their information on our online portal this software is saving a lot of time of mine
author: Ramnath R.
pros: data extraction ability from business cards with 100% accuracy is the best thing in Veryfi OCR
cons: All things are good, but i face issues whenever the text on the business card is in faint colours, veryfi OCR is unable to scan it properly and lost some words.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best app for adding itemized receipts to Quickbooks
description: So far I have had an amazing experience. I introduced it to my bookkeeper and they were very eager to give it a try. Just being able to reduce the amount of time to allocate receipts and expenses for my bakery from 6 hours to 30 minutes makes it incredibly valuable.
author: Mary L.
pros: It quickly and seamlessly itemized my receipts by line item and allocated them to Quickbooks in minutes.
cons: Some of the emails and videos online about how to use it and the pricing/features are outdated, so it was a bit confusing at times during the initial stages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: TravelIT OCR by Veryfi
description: Cannot build the Business without the help of Veryfi OCR; works amazing. Proof reading of docs should be easier. No mathematics to be done by Veryfi; please.
author: Zeldre H.
pros: Veryfi is the answer to the future. It helps big Business treat bulk documents with precision and speeds up processing.
cons: TravelIT Veryfi OCR does some addition of multiple documents, if the Supplier submitting documents, combine all documents into one PDF. The means a double up of amounts; and very often a processing error.

review_title: Excelent!!!!!!!!!
description: A great, easy-to-use tool with powerful rules, but it could be a little faster when searching for IDs and opening files
author: Ailen S.
pros: Supports receipts from Argentina Great User Experience: The app looks clean with big fonts and nice, soft colors. The Dark Mode is excellent and vital for long hours of work. Useful Rules: The Regex (Regular Expressions) tool is great for capturing data that the OCR doesn't read automatically. Simple JSON: The JSON tab is very clear and uses a great color palette to see all the data easily.
cons: My overrall experience is super good. Just some feedback in order to be even better! Loading Speed: The app could be faster when searching for a specific ID and opening documents. OCR Precision: The native OCR needs to be more precise to reduce manual corrections. System Performance: Searching and navigating between files feels a bit slow.

review_title: An Amazing Tool
description: I have been using Veryfi for some time now, and it has fundamentally changed how I manage my financial documents. The platform's core strength is its best-in-class Document Extraction. The entire Processing pipeline, from Receipt or Invoice Upload to structured data, is incredibly fast and accurate, eliminating hours of manual work. What truly impressed me was the gentle Learning Curve; the interface is so intuitive that I was productive almost immediately. For any business, Security is paramount, and Veryfi's commitment to protecting sensitive data is evident and provides complete peace of mind. Furthermore, for developers or businesses needing custom integrations, the well-documented API is a massive advantage, offering powerful flexibility. When you factor in the time saved, the reduction in errors, and the robust security, the Value for Money is undeniable. I wholeheartedly recommend Veryfi to anyone serious about automating their financial data workflow.
author: Ramin K.
pros: The automation of this data entry process is a significant time-saver, freeing up valuable resources for individuals and businesses alike. User reviews frequently emphasize the efficiency gained by eliminating manual data input, which is often described as a tedious and error-prone task. The ability to simply snap a photo of a document and have all the relevant data, including line items, extracted in near real-time is a recurring theme in positive feedback.
cons: everything is great , also the processing , security , prices & excellent customer support , Im Completely HAPPY!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Accurate Results
description: We used the API to scan photos of receipts. We also spent some times on calls with one of their founders. The people leading this company are very sharp and laser focused. I have also noticed the improvements made to their website and administration UI over the last couple of years.
author: Manny P.
pros: The API is easy to use and the results are excellent. We used it for scanning receipts and the data it returned was very accurate and complete. It had every detail from line items, tax and total (which is expected), but also details like store number, register number, and transaction ids. Once we finished integrating this functionality, we have not had to go back to make any changes. It is solid.
cons: Since we have been using it for the last 2 or 3 years, there are none that I can think of.

review_title: easy to use software for data extraction from receipts and bank statements
description: Overall I used this Software's OCR Functionality for data extraction from various receipts and bank statements and SDK's were used by our technical team for multiple clients faster execution and by using this we saved a lot of time and able to deliver our projects before the deadline
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked the data extraction feature, by using this i was able to extract the data from various receipts, bank statements and invoices easily.
cons: i personally think that cost is very high as compared to the features they are providing to the users, cost need to be reduced.

review_title: Recommended OCR Software with very good customer support
description: i used this software for tracking of our expenses of our business, where i used to scan and update each and every inward and outward receipt and by thisusing this software i am getting unified view of all expenses date wise , earlier which was taking a lot of time for me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The customer support is the best, wherever you get stuck they will help you immediately and the accuracy of this OCR software is very good
cons: User interface looks old, they can revamp the UI of the application and make it more interactive

review_title: good software for document scanning and receipts scanning
description: to sum up this my experience was very good, i am using this software minly for scan & OCR functionality of receipt reading of all vendors purchases and get them tally and saved it in my computer for reconcillation. it helped me a lot and increased efficiency.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: user interface is very good and ability to read the receipts and scan and tally the finance number is excellent.
cons: customer support needs to improve and it also faces issues while scanning in low light.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fraud detection has saved us a great deal.
description: Futuristic and results oriented policing and ease of use.
author: Mariano U.
pros: Built with ultimately reliable and dependable technology, it is incredible how automation has saved us time and accuracy.
cons: Probably the only app in my list without challenges.

review_title: A robust tool for real-time document Data extraction
description: I liked it very much as it solved my lot of problems. It offers an intuitive and developer-friendly API. Setting it up is straightforward and the SDK makes it easier to incorporate OCR capabilities into applications without much hassle.
author: Piyusha V.
pros: I like its accuracy a lot when extracting data from invoices and receipts and other documents. its also takes data privacy seriously and offers features to ensure compliance with various regulations, which is particularly important when dealing with sensitive financial documents.
cons: It is on the expensive side, especially for small businesses or startups with limited budgets. the cost of usage, especially as the value of the documents grows, can become a significant factor for business to consider

review_title: Great OCR/AI capoabilities
description: Fantastic so far. The AI accuracy when extracting information is far superior to many others I have tried.
author: Mark W.
pros: I have a small business and receipt entry is a PITA. I have tried several OCR apps and Veryfi was by far the fastest, most accurate, and thorough when extracting information.
cons: It would be great if one could select multiple receipts/expenses and sum up the total to match a bank transaction when doing reconciliations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quick, Easy, AI powered.
description: With Veryfi I can manage all expense reports for my projects, control and see the expenses values on going, by category or vendor. And the best for me is that i can create the expense the expense report at the end of the month just with on click. It solves the problem for me to manage the expense data and documents needed for the tax information and deductions. Again, Thank you Veryfi Team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The app has a very easy interface and is very fast. When you need to scan a receipt, is just one click to open the app e other to click on the camera icon! The AI take car to get all data correctly about the vendor, values and taxes. I tested a lot of apps and Veryfi is the best in document recognition for receipts. and I almost forgot the great feature that I already use in other apps for travelling that is to directly send the receipts to my @veryfi account. Thank you Veryfi team.
cons: This is not a con but a new feature that can help a lot. I really need to export all documents to sent to my tax consultant and it will be very easy if we have this option to select when we create the expense reports, like on option (x) include document images as a zip file. And the other thing, of course, is the name! I always try or write the correct one "Verify". Here is my suggestion for this one ... Just get this domain "http://verify.io/", add AI, Blockchain and ML to the project, do and ICO... and be very rich!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Exactly what I was looking for
author: Alexandra M.
pros: I wanted something simple: take a picture, let the app sort out all the details and allow me to check my expenses in one place. Verify does that!
cons: I wish they had a free version if you just want to keep a record of your receipts and not add any other services in.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Was skeptical at first; now convinced it's the best receipts / expense manager for small business
description: My overall experience with Veryfi has exceeded expectations. As a small business owner with invoices and receipts of all different shapes and sizes, I was quite impressed by how quick and accurate the OCR software was in Veryfi. I was originally skeptical of using Veryfi as it wasn't a proven name in the industry like Expensify, however I am glad I made the choice to use Veryfi as it's far better than its competitors for my purposes.
author: Jason N.
pros: The software is highly intuitive and easy to learn. The process of uploading receipts, editing previous entries, or changing a vendor name, follows a familiar flow nearly all smartphone users will feel accustomed to. What I enjoyed the most about Veryfi are the certain features I never had on my list of requirements (or thought to be important) in an expense manager but turns out to be extremely helpful. For example, extracting the vendor address from a receipt is something I thought of as a "nice to have" but not a requirement. Now this feature is something I can't live without as it helps automate my purchases based on the proximity to my business. This is helpful for large chains and big box stores with many locations, I can now split out personal and business expenses far more easily. This is what distinguishes good software from great software. Good software completes a task in a way you wanted it to; great software completes the job in a better way than what you had in mind, and that's what Veryfi does with receipts.
cons: Not sure if this is Veryfi's issue, however the integration with QuickBooks online can be improved. I never get the confidence of whether a receipt has been uploaded and matched on QB, aside from the green QB logo being red. If there was a better way to bulk manage expenses and how it's uploaded into QB, and what it's QB status is (ie. matched, no match, amounts not matching, etc) that would be helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Automate AP with ease
author: Ryan R.
pros: I was able to quickly automate my AP which consists of a bunch of construction materials that have up to 150 line items in one invoice. Veryfi Handles it with ease and accurately
cons: expense management subscription was good - but lacked all of the muscle that the API subscription has.

review_title: Best Receipt Capturing App Around
author: Ryan W.
pros: This app does everything I need that many apps can’t do. Receipt capture, data collection of price, time and business name, automatically changes the file name to what you need it to say (date/business name/price) and automatically uploads it to Google drive organized and easy during tax season to match my statements with the proof of receipt.
cons: Wish they had discounted prices for loyal customers. I’ve been using this app for over 2+ years and have helped with bugs since I was an initial user

review_title: One of the best on the market
description: Veryfi is one of the most effective and reliable Receipt tracking systems available. It makes bookkeeping and accounting a breeze come tax time.
author: Brendan B.
pros: Being able to take a photo of the receipt on the go and view and approve it later.
cons: Few issues with the camera software and doesn't always take a clear picture the first time.

review_title: Fantastic software, desire personal version
description: Overall a fantastic experience. I hope that they will include a personal finance option. I know that they will continue to improve the OCR with each update to the mobile software.
author: Aidan K.
pros: I love this software, it is fantastic with keeping up with receipts, the software pulls most if not all of the information off the receipt automatically, which is a great feature. The overall OCR function works great, and it works great for tracking certain transaction categories to keep an eye on spending. It’s been great to use for reimbursement itemization while I was interviewing.
cons: Their OCR could be slightly improved as I’ve had issues with the camera recognizing the receipt for more than a second, cycling through shapes and having issues with taking a photo and having it select a shape other than the one in the last cycle. I also wish that they had a personal finance option as I would love to manage my own finances without some of the selections or details of a company.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wonderful product!
description: As accountant I save time and money because with Veryfi do some task on my work are just taking seconds, Also generate automatically reports are very useful for me to compare my expenses and take decisions on my business.
author: Laura G.
pros: Easy to use, amazing support 24 hours, and the most important thing I save a lot of money using this product, good job Veryfi team!
cons: Nothing everything is perfect, new features each week and that's fantastic! waiting for android version of logbook app

review_title: Eager To Please, Stellar Support
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: How easy and fast it is to capture receipts before they are lost
cons: Sometimes updates and feature might come too fast

review_title: Powerful software for real time bookeeping
author: Justin F.
pros: Veryfi OCR API allows to connect a lot of financial data in real time to our CRM trough a simple technology. All the blocks for the different code languages are already built and allow us to keep track of pretty much all our banking data.
cons: The only thing I didn't like is the fact that I had to convince my accountant to work on this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very thoughtfully-designed expense tracking app w/super fast OCR, great features
author: Ori B.
pros: Multiple ways to easily input expenses: snap a photo with your phone, drag & drop via the web interface, or forward receipts by email to a dedicated email address. Also have the ability to connect Dropbox (among other third party apps) so that all my receipts are instantly backed up to a designated DB folder. I've tried several apps out there to track both personal and business expenses, and VeryFi is my favorite to date, by far. Really excellent stuff. The customer support staff have also been very helpful when needed. Keep it up, guys!
cons: While I'm sure some things could always be enhanced, nothing comes to mind that I would call a "dislike." So long as the team continues to tweak, update, and listen to their customers, they'll be just fine.

review_title: Excellent receipt management
author: Rich P.
pros: Love being able to track and place receipts for each job and tracking the spending. Gives us time to do other important tasks instead of having to go through hundreds of receipts
cons: I wish the users were able to add their own specific jobs to the app. They have to wait for an admin to add it in

review_title: Easiest and fastest way I've seen yet for my team to enter receipts
description: Saves time attaching receipts to Quickbooks Online software. Hoping for better receipt recovery with this app.
author: Lisa M.
pros: Prior to trying Veryfi, I was scanning and attaching all paper receipts to Quickbooks Online after team members piled them on my desk after a week of being on the road. Now team members can quickly snap a photo of the receipt, choose the expense category and customer and within 10 seconds it has arrived in my Quickbooks Online. I was worried that Quickbooks would duplicate the entries, but it doesn't. Quickbooks recognizes the entries and matches them up from the bank feeds seamlessly. We tried Expensify last year and it just wasn't quite what we needed and team members thought it was too complicated. Veryfi is simple. From my desktop or the mobile app, I can create jobs and customers, edit expense categories, send text messages to team members (WHAT?? Yassss!) Track mileage. I'm still discovering many of the features that are available. Time tracking - We currently use T-Sheets, so not sure if we will switch or not. Maybe. So far I'm really loving it!
cons: The price is going to be our only negative so far. Would like the whole team to be able to use it, but not sure if it would be cost effective.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
